Here we are going to discuss what happens when Saturn is in Ashwini Nakshatra in your natal chart.
Features of Ashwini Nakshatra - 
Degrees - 00' to 13'20 Aries Symbol- Horse head Deity - Ashwini Kumaras Ruling planet - Ketu  Gana - Devta Element - Earth Animal - Male Horse Bird - Hamsa ( Swan )  Purusharth - Dharma Mode of functioning - Active Gender - Male Guna- Sathvic
